match.userMessage:
Handheld camera with natural micro-movement holds a wide centered frame on Scarlett seated at the crisp white vanity. She lifts the coral lipstick tube from its minimal box and slowly traces its matte finish with her fingertips in deliberate motion before executing a slow turn toward camera. Sunlight slices through the open windows casting directional shadows across the neutral linen surfaces.

Scarlett delivers her soft reflective voice-over line with a gentle head tilt and relaxed posture while holding the product.

Light linen fabric shifts subtly from the morning breeze while dust motes drift through the beams of natural light.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: gentle morning breeze through open windows with distant soft birdsong. soft lipstick tube lift from box, fingertips tracing matte surface.
